_comment: All events sorted chronologically by TimeOffsetMinutes.
_comment2: Attack stages (1-Identity through 5-Endpoint) are naturally interleaved
_comment3: with background noise. The seeding script sends all events in a single
_comment4: API call — no artificial attack/noise separation.
_comment5: Severity profile: Medium/Low for early attack stages, High only at endpoint.
